_note:
Demo Mode shape for /api/generate-variants. Mirrors Leaply taxonomy.
Intentionally groups by Core Message so the UI demonstrates folder grouping:
- 2 variants share 'blocked-lymph-flow' CM (different Visual Formats)
- 1 variant has 'aging-not-cause' CM
- 1 variant is a Frankenstein (mix-and-match)
- 1 variant has 'root-cause' CM

variants.hook_text: Sitting 8 hours a day? Your lymph system is screaming.
variants.ae_brief: Energetic female trainer, 35, gym setting, direct camera. Quick cuts: office chair → swollen ankles → lymph diagram animation. Punchy text overlay on 'screaming'.

variants.hook_text: Your lymph nodes are blocked. Most people only realize it after years of swelling.
variants.ae_brief: Woman 40-50, white coat, clinical setting, soft window light. Direct camera gaze, slight lean-in on 'blocked'. Calm clinical tone with subtle urgency.

variants.hook_text: My doctor said this was just aging. She was wrong.
variants.ae_brief: Woman 55, soft natural lighting, sitting at home, no makeup. Talking head UGC style, handheld camera. Slow zoom in. No phone visible.

variants.hook_text: POV: you finally figured out why your neck always hurts.
variants.ae_brief: Woman 28, selfie cam angle, bedroom morning light. Vertical handheld framing. Quick reveal moment. Authentic candid energy.

variants.hook_text: I gave it to my mom — she stopped wearing scarves. Her own doctor was shocked.
variants.ae_brief: MIX-AND-MATCH: Opens UGC selfie style (daughter, 30, kitchen) saying first sentence → cut to clinical mid-shot of mother + doctor for second sentence. Two-shot story arc in 8s. Different lighting per cut: warm kitchen → cool clinic.
